cpu.description: The amount of CPU units to allocate to the container.

disable_networking.description: A flag indicating whether networking is disabled within the container.

docker_labels.description: A set of key-value pairs for Docker labels assigned to the container.

environment.description: Environment variables available to the container.

id.description: The unique identifier for the container definition.

image.description: The Docker image used for the container.

image_digest.description: The image digest for the container's image.

memory.description: The hard limit of memory (in MiB) allocated to the container.

memory_reservation.description: The soft limit of memory (in MiB) reserved for the container.
